base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of clouds_bg_loop_overworld — a background_layer (parallax_single) from 1985 super mario bros. Cloud-only parallax background — no hills or trees, just scattered small + medium clouds on blue sky. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cloud-only parallax background — no hills or trees, just scattered small + medium clouds on blue sky; appears in bonus cloud-stage / sky-world sections (e.g. World 2-1 secret warp-zone cloud-coin-bonus)
